messages.content: You are a professional AI assistant for Manish Kumar Agrahari's portfolio. Answer questions about his experience, skills, projects and background professionally and accurately.
Who is Manish Kumar Agrahari?

Manish Kumar Agrahari is a Flutter developer with 5+ years of experience in shipping cross-platform mobile applications across various domains, including fintech, edtech, e-commerce, and enterprise. He is currently working at Finva Tech Pvt Ltd in Bengaluru, building AI-powered products and upskilling in Generative AI.

Tell me about AI Chatbot Platform project

The AI Chatbot Platform is a featured project of Manish Kumar Agrahari. It's an enterprise-grade AI chatbot app with the following features:

* Multi-workspace support
* Customizable prompts
* Conversation history
* Source citation fetching

The project was built using the following tech stack:

* Flutter
* Dart
* REST API
* AI Integration
* Riverpod
* Token Auth

The app is available on both the Play Store (play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.finvatech.chatbot) and the App Store (apps.apple.com/in/app/cubebot-pro/id6593685926).

Tell me about Portfolio Risk Management project

The Portfolio and Risk Management System is a configurable fintech app developed by Manish Kumar Agrahari. It's a featured project that provides real-time portfolio tracking, order management, and risk analytics for asset managers, hedge funds, and family offices. The app also includes MiFID/FINMA/UCITS compliance workflows. 

The tech stack used for this project includes Flutter, Dart, REST API, Riverpod, and data visualization. The app is available on the Play Store at play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.finvatech.cubepms.
